name: Delivery Task Handoff
description: Turn a completed support investigation into ready-to-start delivery work.
whenToUse: Use this when you want to turn a completed support investigation into ready-to-start delivery work.
Best for support and success teams that want repeatable work without changing the tools they already use.

stages.title: Confirm Thread Instruction
stages.summary: Re-read the main thread and confirm the task instruction belongs to the same thread as the support conclusion.

stages.title: Create Delivery Task
stages.summary: Create delivery-ready tracker work with cause, scope, acceptance criteria, verification expectations, and preserved chat refs.

stages.title: Post Task Handoff
stages.summary: Reply in the main thread with the task link/key, scoped delivery summary, and engineering.tracked-delivery handoff.

stages.title: Add Task-Created Reaction
stages.summary: Add a semantically matching reaction to the main message only after task creation succeeds.
